meaning: n.阁楼,顶楼,[解剖](耳的)鼓室上的隐窝adj.(古希腊)雅典(Athens)的
examples: We need the steps to get into the attic.
They hid me from the police in their attic.
I've cleared out all that old junk in the attic.
Still, he advises, don't let that stop you from combing through you grandfather's attic.
"I was in the attic and he scared me because he yelled at me, " Falcon said.
